home.title: Independent Digital Identity
home.description: Welcome to my personal space on the web.

about.title: About Me
about.description: The person behind the digital identity.
about.bio1: I am an independent developer focused on creating high-performance, minimalist digital experiences. I believe in the KISS principle: Keep It Simple, Stupid. Complex problems often have elegant, straightforward solutions if you take the time to look for them.
about.bio2: My current focus is on modern web architecture, edge computing, and building platforms that maximize E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) without sacrificing speed or privacy.
about.architectureDescription: How data flows through my personal ecosystem in real-time.
